# BP-97 negative: the bufio writer is flushed before reading the buffer
lang: go
file: BP-97-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bufio"
	"bytes"
)

func encode() string {
	buf := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := bufio.NewWriter(buf)
	writer.WriteString("payload")
	writer.Flush()
	return buf.String()
}
